promoted_facts.fact: Restaurant Brands available: Spencer's (registered), Poppy's, Haley & Bear, The Comeback, Che Vita, Magnolia Smokehouse & Kitchen, Piebird (all pending registration)
StiR Creative Collective F&B consulting costs $65,000-$175,000 for up to 2 outlets
HSM administrative fees from franchisee purchases: $38,697,912 in 2024
Hilton affiliate revenues from sales to all brand franchisees: $1,101,161,898 in 2024 (excluding royalty/program fees and HSM)
Hilton JV Acquisition LLC holds non-controlling equity interest in Groups360 LLC
Strategic Partnerships: SLH, AutoCamp, Evermore Resort, Field Station
2 eforea spas at franchised hotels, 3 at company-managed hotels as of 12/31/2024
Franchise termination fees spiked from $2.4M (2023) to $18.3M (2024) — a 7.5x increase
Advance Purchase Program: optional, 4.5% Advance Purchase Fee (currently waived for digital payments via Adyen)
